title: Stylista - LabPBR
description: A stylized theme LabPBR resource pack made from scratch.
body:
**Website:** https://www.shivamzter.com
## What is Stylista? A stylized theme, PBR resource pack that I'm creating from scratch with the aim of completely overhauling vanilla textures. > **256x & 512x** versions comes with **Addons** & features like **CTM** and is available on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/Shivamzter) and [Gumroad](https://shivamzter.gumroad.com/).
![Resolution comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d9f56589b308b1e0cc729c33fd603ca843d54f3.jpeg) ## How do I install? Please follow the installation [guide](https://www.shivamzter.com/installation), If you have any questions or encounter any issues then please join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/5rxYKg4ceD) server where either someone from the community or I will be happy to help you out! > It is neccessary to use a **LabPBR compliant shader** to utilize all the PBR features, I recommend **Kappa/KappaPT** Shaders by **Rre36**.
Legal **You are not allowed to make commercial use, redistribute or claim this resource pack as your own in any way.**
**You can edit the resource pack for personal use only.**
If you showcase the resource pack in social media, kindly provide a link to my website [https://www.shivamzter.com/stylista](https://www.shivamzter.com/stylista).
